query: SELECT id, businessManagerId, businessManagerName, createdAt FROM token_vault WHERE businessManagerName LIKE '%luminere%' OR businessManagerName LIKE '%Luminere%' OR businessManagerName LIKE '%LUMINERE%' OR businessManagerName LIKE '%iluminere%' OR businessManagerName LIKE '%Iluminere%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3dMqJsm4KG1E8QU.03f2dd191437 --database UQDffrrvDgfhtLegk7yN6M --execute SELECT id, businessManagerId, businessManagerName, createdAt FROM token_vault WHERE businessManagerName LIKE '%luminere%' OR businessManagerName LIKE '%Luminere%' OR businessManagerName LIKE '%LUMINERE%' OR businessManagerName LIKE '%iluminere%' OR businessManagerName LIKE '%Iluminere%';
